identity.name: High Notes Coffee + Vinyl
identity.address: Roncesvalles / Dundas West (2057 Dundas St W)

narrative.summary: Coffee-by-day, vinyl-bar-by-evening. Neighbourhood listening room with a 4.9★ rating from 208 reviews. Curated record selection. Quieter, more contemplative than the nightlife spots. Worth a focused stop when John is mapping the next design-conscious neighborhood run.
